
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="description" content="Ojasvi Kushwaha â€” 15-year-old founder, builder and athlete. Building Unseen, an AI evidence engine that turns real experiences into verified skill proof. Web projects, content, and the chaos of doing too much at once.">
<title>Ojasvi "Jaz" Kushwaha â€” Founder Â· Builder Â· Athlete</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Bricolage+Grotesque:opsz,wght@12..96,300;12..96,400;12..96,500;12..96,600;12..96,700;12..96,800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Caveat:wght@600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --coral:#FF6B47; --yellow:#FFD93D; --lavender:#B8A9E8; --mint:#6DDBB4;
  --dark:#1A1209; --cream:#FFF8EE; --pink:#FF8FAB;
  --stroke:2.5px; --shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--dark);
}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;}
body{background:var(--cream);color:var(--dark);font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}
img{max-width:100%;}
::selection{background:var(--dark);color:var(--yellow);}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:11px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--cream);border-left:2px solid var(--dark);}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--coral);border:2px solid var(--dark);}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:9000;opacity:.45;mix-blend-mode:multiply;}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:.01ms !important;animation-iteration-count:1 !important;transition-duration:.01ms !important;}html{scroll-behavior:auto;}}

/* â”€â”€â”€ NAV â”€â”€â”€ */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;padding:1.35rem 3rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;transition:background .4s,backdrop-filter .4s,border-color .4s,padding .4s;border-bottom:1px solid transparent;}
nav.scrolled{background:rgba(255,248,238,.86);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border-bottom:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:.95rem 3rem;}
.nav-status{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.55rem;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;font-weight:700;}
.status-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#1f9c4a;border:1.5px solid var(--dark);animation:pulse-dot 2s ease-in-out infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
@keyframes pulse-dot{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}50%{transform:scale(.7);opacity:.6;}}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.2rem;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.09em;color:var(--dark);text-decoration:none;position:relative;font-weight:700;transition:color .2s;}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;bottom:-4px;width:0;height:2.5px;background:var(--coral);transition:width .25s;}
.nav-links a:hover::after,.nav-links a.active::after{width:100%;}
.nav-links a.active{color:var(--coral);}
.nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;}
.nav-cta{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.09em;color:var(--dark);background:var(--yellow);padding:.55rem 1.05rem;text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);box-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--dark);transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;white-space:nowrap;}
.nav-cta:hover{transform:translate(-2px,-2px);box-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--dark);}
.nav-cta:active{transform:translate(1px,1px);box-shadow:2px 2px 0 var(--dark);}
.burger{display:none;width:44px;height:40px;background:var(--cream);border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);box-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--dark);cursor:pointer;position:relative;z-index:1002;padding:0;}
.burger span{display:block;width:20px;height:2.5px;background:var(--dark);margin:4px auto;transition:transform .3s,opacity .3s;}
body.menu-open .burger span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg);}
body.menu-open .burger span:nth-child(2){opacity:0;}
body.menu-open .burger span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg);}
.mobile-menu{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--coral);z-index:999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:5rem 2rem 3rem;transform:translateY(-102%);transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
body.menu-open .mobile-menu{transform:translateY(0);}
body.menu-open{overflow:hidden;}
.mobile-menu a.mm-link{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:3.4rem;line-height:1.14;color:var(--cream);text-decoration:none;text-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--dark);width:fit-content;}
.mobile-menu a.mm-link:nth-child(even){color:var(--yellow);}
.mm-foot{margin-top:2.2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start;}
.mm-foot .nav-cta{font-size:.8rem;}

/* â”€â”€â”€ HERO â”€â”€â”€ */
#hero{min-height:100vh;min-height:100svh;position:relative;background:var(--coral);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:7.5rem 3rem 6rem;overflow:hidden;}
.halftone{position:absolute;background-image:radial-gradient(var(--dark) 1.7px,transparent 1.7px);background-size:13px 13px;opacity:.14;pointer-events:none;}
.ht-hero{top:-40px;right:-40px;width:340px;height:340px;transform:rotate(8deg);}
.doodles{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:1;}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:10;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;}
.hero-kicker{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.8rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.24em;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.5rem;opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);animation:fadeUp .7s .15s forwards;}
.hero-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(4.6rem,15vw,13rem);line-height:.85;letter-spacing:.01em;color:var(--cream);text-shadow:6px 6px 0 var(--dark);opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);animation:fadeUp .85s .3s forwards;}
.hero-name .l2{display:block;color:var(--yellow);opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);animation:fadeUp .85s .45s forwards;}
.jaz-note{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.65rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cream);margin-top:1rem;transform:rotate(-2deg);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.55rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s .55s forwards;}
.jaz-note svg{width:36px;height:auto;flex-shrink:0;}
.jaz-note b{color:var(--yellow);font-weight:700;}
.hero-sub{font-size:clamp(1.05rem,2vw,1.4rem);font-weight:500;max-width:560px;line-height:1.6;margin-top:1.9rem;opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);animation:fadeUp .7s .62s forwards;}
.words{display:inline-block;height:1.4em;overflow:hidden;vertical-align:bottom;background:var(--yellow);border:2px solid var(--dark);box-shadow:2.5px 2.5px 0 var(--dark);padding:0 .4em;transform:rotate(-1.2deg);}
.words-in{display:flex;flex-direction:column;animation:roll 9s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) infinite;}
.words-in span{display:block;height:1.4em;line-height:1.4em;font-weight:800;white-space:nowrap;}
@keyframes roll{0%,17%{transform:translateY(0);}25%,42%{transform:translateY(-1.4em);}50%,67%{transform:translateY(-2.8em);}75%,92%{transform:translateY(-4.2em);}100%{transform:translateY(-5.6em);}}
.hero-meta{display:flex;gap:2.8rem;margin-top:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);animation:fadeUp .7s .78s forwards;}
.hm-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.3rem;}
.hm-label{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.14em;color:rgba(26,18,9,.55);font-weight:700;}
.hm-value{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;}
.hero-stickers{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:2.3rem;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);animation:fadeUp .7s .95s forwards;}
.chip{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:.5rem .95rem;box-shadow:3.5px 3.5px 0 var(--dark);}
.chip.c1{background:var(--yellow);transform:rotate(-2.4deg);}
.chip.c2{background:var(--mint);transform:rotate(1.6deg);}
.chip.c3{background:var(--pink);transform:rotate(-1.2deg);}
.hero-star{position:absolute;z-index:5;width:175px;right:9%;top:15%;transform:rotate(9deg);animation:bob 3.4s ease-in-out infinite;filter:drop-shadow(4px 5px 0 rgba(26,18,9,.22));pointer-events:none;}
@keyframes bob{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(9deg);}50%{transform:translateY(-13px) rotate(9deg);}}
.float-note{position:absolute;z-index:6;font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:700;background:var(--mint);border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:.5rem 1.1rem;box-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--dark);top:57%;right:8%;transform:rotate(4deg);}
.scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:2.6rem;right:3rem;z-index:10;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s 1.15s forwards;}
.scroll-hint span{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.18em;color:rgba(26,18,9,.55);writing-mode:vertical-rl;font-weight:700;}
.scroll-line{width:2.5px;height:56px;background:var(--dark);transform-origin:top;animation:scrollGrow 1.6s 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes scrollGrow{0%{transform:scaleY(0);opacity:0;}45%{transform:scaleY(1);opacity:1;transform-origin:top;}55%{transform:scaleY(1);opacity:1;transform-origin:bottom;}100%{transform:scaleY(0);opacity:0;transform-origin:bottom;}}
@keyframes fadeUp{to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}

/* â”€â”€â”€ MARQUEES â”€â”€â”€ */
.marquee{overflow:hidden;padding:.85rem 0;border-top:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);border-bottom:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);}
.marquee.m1{background:var(--dark);}
.marquee.m2{background:var(--yellow);border-top:none;}
.marquee-track{display:flex;width:max-content;animation:marq 26s linear infinite;}
.marquee.m2 .marquee-track{animation-direction:reverse;animation-duration:30s;}
.marquee-track span{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:1.25rem;letter-spacing:.09em;padding:0 2.1rem;white-space:nowrap;}
.marquee.m1 span{color:var(--cream);}
.marquee.m1 span.dot{color:var(--coral);}
.marquee.m2 span{color:var(--dark);}
.marquee.m2 span.dot{color:var(--coral);}
@keyframes marq{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}

/* â”€â”€â”€ SECTION BASE â”€â”€â”€ */
section{padding:7.5rem 3rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;scroll-margin-top:70px;}
.shell{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.sec-kicker{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.sec-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(3.4rem,9vw,7.5rem);line-height:.88;letter-spacing:.02em;}

/* â”€â”€â”€ ABOUT â”€â”€â”€ */
#about{background:var(--dark);color:var(--cream);}
#about .sec-kicker{color:var(--mint);}
#about .sec-title{color:var(--yellow);text-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--coral);}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.02fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start;margin-top:3.2rem;}
.about-body{font-size:1.18rem;font-weight:400;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(255,248,238,.8);}
.about-body strong{color:var(--yellow);font-weight:700;}
.hl{background:var(--coral);color:var(--cream);padding:.06em .3em;font-weight:700;display:inline-block;transform:rotate(-.6deg);}
.about-rule{width:52px;height:4px;background:var(--coral);margin:2.4rem 0;}
.squiggle{margin:1.9rem 0 0;max-width:100%;height:auto;}
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);margin-top:2.8rem;}
.stat-cell{border:var(--stroke) solid rgba(255,248,238,.18);border-right:none;padding:1.5rem 1.2rem;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s;}
.stat-cell:last-child{border-right:var(--stroke) solid rgba(255,248,238,.18);}
.stat-cell:hover{border-color:var(--coral);background:var(--coral);}
.stat-cell:hover .stat-n,.stat-cell:hover .stat-suf{color:var(--cream);}
.stat-cell:hover .stat-l{color:rgba(255,248,238,.9);}
.stat-n,.stat-suf{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:3.4rem;color:var(--coral);line-height:1;transition:color .2s;}
.stat-l{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:rgba(255,248,238,.5);margin-top:.4rem;transition:color .2s;display:block;font-weight:700;}
.currently{background:var(--cream);color:var(--dark);border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:2.4rem 1.9rem 2rem;position:relative;box-shadow:9px 9px 0 var(--coral);}
.tape{position:absolute;width:96px;height:27px;background:rgba(255,217,61,.9);border:1.5px solid rgba(26,18,9,.3);top:-14px;}
.tape.t1{left:26px;transform:rotate(-7deg);}
.tape.t2{right:26px;transform:rotate(5deg);}
.cur-label{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.17em;color:rgba(26,18,9,.45);margin-bottom:1.2rem;font-weight:700;}
.cur-item{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:.85rem;padding:.85rem 0;border-bottom:1.5px solid rgba(26,18,9,.12);}
.cur-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;padding-bottom:0;}
.cur-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--coral);border:1.5px solid var(--dark);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:5px;}
.cur-text{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.4;}
.cur-sub{display:block;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:rgba(26,18,9,.5);margin-top:.3rem;font-weight:400;}

/* â”€â”€â”€ CHECKER DIVIDER â”€â”€â”€ */
.checker{height:30px;border-top:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);border-bottom:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);background:repeating-conic-gradient(var(--dark) 0 25%,var(--lavender) 0 50%) 0 0/30px 30px;}

/* â”€â”€â”€ PROJECTS â”€â”€â”€ */
#projects{background:var(--lavender);}
#projects .sec-title{color:var(--dark);text-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--cream);}
.projects-list{margin-top:4rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2.6rem;}
.project-card{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 235px;gap:2.6rem;align-items:center;background:var(--cream);border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:2.6rem 2.7rem;position:relative;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s;overflow:hidden;}
.project-card:hover{transform:translate(-5px,-5px);box-shadow:13px 13px 0 var(--dark);}
.project-card:nth-child(even){grid-template-columns:235px 1fr;}
.project-card:nth-child(even) .pc-media{order:-1;}
.pc-ghost{position:absolute;top:-2.6rem;right:1.2rem;font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:9.5rem;line-height:1;color:transparent;-webkit-text-stroke:2.5px rgba(26,18,9,.13);pointer-events:none;user-select:none;}
.project-card:nth-child(even) .pc-ghost{right:auto;left:1.2rem;}
.pc-tags{display:flex;gap:.55rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:1.1rem;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.pc-tag{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;padding:.3rem .75rem;border:1.5px solid var(--dark);font-weight:700;transition:transform .18s;}
.pc-tag:nth-child(1){background:var(--yellow);transform:rotate(-2deg);}
.pc-tag:nth-child(2){background:var(--mint);transform:rotate(1.4deg);}
.pc-tag:nth-child(3){background:var(--pink);transform:rotate(-1.2deg);}
.project-card:hover .pc-tag{transform:rotate(0deg);}
.pc-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.4rem,4.8vw,3.5rem);letter-spacing:.02em;line-height:.95;margin-bottom:.9rem;transition:color .2s;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.project-card:hover .pc-name{color:var(--coral);}
.pc-desc{font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(26,18,9,.74);position:relative;z-index:2;}
.pc-media{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.pc-media img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;filter:drop-shadow(4px 5px 0 rgba(26,18,9,.2));transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
.project-card:nth-child(odd) .pc-media img{transform:rotate(-4deg);}
.project-card:nth-child(even) .pc-media img{transform:rotate(4deg);}
.project-card:hover .pc-media img{animation:wiggle .55s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes wiggle{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-3.5deg) scale(1.05);}50%{transform:rotate(3.5deg) scale(1.05);}}

/* â”€â”€â”€ WAVE â”€â”€â”€ */
.wave svg{display:block;width:100%;}

/* â”€â”€â”€ ACHIEVEMENTS â”€â”€â”€ */
#achievements{background:var(--yellow);}
#achievements .sec-title{color:var(--dark);text-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--coral);}
.ht-ach{bottom:-50px;left:-50px;width:300px;height:300px;transform:rotate(-6deg);}
.achieve-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1.7rem;margin-top:4rem;}
.achieve-cell{background:var(--cream);border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:2rem 2.1rem;box-shadow:6px 6px 0 var(--dark);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.achieve-cell:nth-child(6n+1){transform:rotate(-1.3deg);}
.achieve-cell:nth-child(6n+2){transform:rotate(1.1deg);}
.achieve-cell:nth-child(6n+3){transform:rotate(.8deg);}
.achieve-cell:nth-child(6n+4){transform:rotate(-.9deg);}
.achieve-cell:nth-child(6n+5){transform:rotate(1.4deg);}
.achieve-cell:nth-child(6n+6){transform:rotate(-1.1deg);}
.achieve-cell:hover{transform:rotate(0deg) translate(-3px,-3px);box-shadow:10px 10px 0 var(--dark);}
.achieve-grid .achieve-cell:last-child:nth-child(odd){grid-column:1/-1;}
.ac-year{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--coral);margin-bottom:.65rem;font-weight:700;}
.ac-title{font-size:1.16rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:.55rem;}
.ac-desc{font-size:.93rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.6;color:rgba(26,18,9,.72);}

/* â”€â”€â”€ CONTENT â”€â”€â”€ */
#content{background:var(--mint);}
#content .sec-title{color:var(--dark);text-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--cream);}
.platforms{margin-top:4rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.platform-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:12rem 1fr auto;gap:2rem;align-items:center;padding:2rem 0;border-bottom:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);transition:padding-left .3s;}
.platform-row:first-child{border-top:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);}
.platform-row:hover{padding-left:1.1rem;}
.pf-label{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:rgba(26,18,9,.5);display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-weight:700;}
.pf-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:2.3rem;letter-spacing:.03em;transition:color .2s;}
.platform-row:hover .pf-name{color:var(--coral);}
.pf-desc{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.6;color:rgba(26,18,9,.72);}
.pf-link{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--dark);text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:700;border:2px solid var(--dark);padding:.5rem 1rem;background:var(--cream);box-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--dark);transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;}
.pf-link:hover{transform:translate(-2px,-2px);box-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--dark);}
.content-note{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:2.7rem;display:inline-block;background:var(--yellow);border:2px solid var(--dark);padding:.4rem 1rem;transform:rotate(-1.4deg);box-shadow:3.5px 3.5px 0 var(--dark);}

/* â”€â”€â”€ CONTACT â”€â”€â”€ */
#contact{background:var(--dark);color:var(--cream);}
#contact .sec-kicker{color:var(--mint);}
.ht-contact{top:-40px;right:-60px;width:280px;height:280px;opacity:.1;background-image:radial-gradient(var(--cream) 1.7px,transparent 1.7px);}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr 1fr;gap:5rem;}
.contact-head{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(3.4rem,7vw,6.4rem);line-height:.92;letter-spacing:.02em;margin-top:1.1rem;color:var(--cream);}
.circled{position:relative;font-style:normal;color:var(--coral);display:inline-block;}
.circled svg{position:absolute;inset:-16% -12%;width:124%;height:132%;overflow:visible;pointer-events:none;}
.circled ellipse{fill:none;stroke:var(--yellow);stroke-width:4.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-dasharray:1;stroke-dashoffset:1;transition:stroke-dashoffset 1.2s ease .45s;}
.visible .circled ellipse{stroke-dashoffset:0;}
.contact-body{font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,248,238,.65);margin-top:1.6rem;max-width:400px;}
.contact-cta{display:inline-block;margin-top:2rem;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.78rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.09em;font-weight:700;color:var(--dark);background:var(--yellow);border:var(--stroke) solid var(--dark);padding:.9rem 1.5rem;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--coral);transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;}
.contact-cta:hover{transform:translate(-3px,-3px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--coral);}
.copy-email{display:inline-block;margin:2rem 0 0 1rem;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.09em;font-weight:700;background:transparent;color:var(--cream);border:2px dashed rgba(255,248,238,.5);padding:.9rem 1.3rem;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,color .2s,transform .15s;}
.copy-email:hover{border-color:var(--yellow);color:var(--yellow);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.copy-email.done{border-style:solid;border-color:var(--mint);color:var(--mint);}
.contact-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin-top:1rem;}
.cl-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:1.35rem .9rem;margin:0 -.9rem;border-bottom:var(--stroke) solid rgba(255,248,238,.15);text-decoration:none;color:var(--cream);transition:padding-left .3s,border-color .3s,background .3s;}
.cl-row:first-child{border-top:var(--stroke) solid rgba(255,248,238,.15);}
.cl-row:hover{padding-left:1.7rem;border-color:var(--coral);background:rgba(255,248,238,.05);}
.cl-label{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.13em;color:rgba(255,248,238,.4);display:block;margin-bottom:.28rem;font-weight:700;}
.cl-value{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;transition:color .2s;word-break:break-word;}
.cl-row:hover .cl-value{color:var(--coral);}
.cl-arrow{color:rgba(255,248,238,.35);font-size:1.15rem;transition:color .2s,transform .2s;padding-left:1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.cl-row:hover .cl-arrow{color:var(--coral);transform:translate(4px,-4px);}

/* â”€â”€â”€ FOOTER â”€â”€â”€ */
footer{background:var(--dark);color:var(--cream);border-top:var(--stroke) solid rgba(255,248,238,.12);padding:4.5rem 3rem 2rem;}
.footer-main{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;}
.footer-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:2.5rem;letter-spacing:.03em;line-height:1;}
.footer-name em{font-style:normal;color:var(--coral);}
.footer-tag{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.65;color:rgba(255,248,238,.55);margin-top:1rem;max-width:330px;}
.footer-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1.4rem;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.63rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--mint);font-weight:700;}
.footer-status .status-dot{background:#3ecf72;border-color:#3ecf72;}
.footer-h{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.18em;color:rgba(255,248,238,.4);display:block;margin-bottom:1.2rem;font-weight:700;}
.footer-col a{display:block;color:var(--cream);text-decoration:none;font-size:.97rem;font-weight:600;padding:.42rem 0;transition:color .2s,padding-left .2s;width:fit-content;}
.footer-col a:hover{color:var(--coral);padding-left:.4rem;}
.footer-squiggle{max-width:1100px;margin:3rem auto 0;opacity:.28;display:block;}
.footer-bottom{max-width:1100px;margin:2rem auto 0;padding-top:1.6rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,248,238,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.foot-copy{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:rgba(255,248,238,.35);font-weight:400;}
.back-top{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.11em;color:var(--yellow);text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;transition:transform .2s;display:inline-block;}
.back-top:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);}

/* â”€â”€â”€ REVEAL â”€â”€â”€ */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(36px);transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.rd1{transition-delay:.1s;}.rd2{transition-delay:.2s;}.rd3{transition-delay:.3s;}

/* â”€â”€â”€ TABLET â”€â”€â”€ */
@media (max-width:900px){
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:3.2rem;}
  .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:3rem;}
  .footer-main{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .footer-brand{grid-column:1/-1;}
  .hero-star{width:135px;right:5%;top:13%;}
}

/* â”€â”€â”€ MOBILE â”€â”€â”€ */
@media (max-width:640px){
  nav,nav.scrolled{padding:.9rem 1.15rem;}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  .nav-status{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.09em;}
  .nav-cta{display:none;}
  .burger{display:block;}
  section{padding:4.8rem 1.25rem;}
  #hero{padding:5.6rem 1.25rem 4rem;min-height:100svh;}
  .ht-hero{width:200px;height:200px;top:-30px;right:-50px;}
  .hero-kicker{font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.18em;padding-right:98px;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .hero-star{width:92px;right:.7rem;top:4.9rem;}
  .hero-name{font-size:clamp(4rem,19.5vw,5.6rem);text-shadow:4px 4px 0 var(--dark);}
  .jaz-note{font-size:1.3rem;margin-top:.7rem;}
  .jaz-note svg{width:28px;}
  .hero-sub{margin-top:1.3rem;font-size:1.02rem;}
  .hero-meta{gap:1.3rem 2rem;margin-top:2rem;}
  .hm-value{font-size:.92rem;}
  .hero-stickers{gap:.8rem;margin-top:1.9rem;}
  .chip{font-size:.6rem;padding:.45rem .75rem;}
  .float-note{position:static;display:inline-block;margin-top:1.7rem;font-size:1.15rem;transform:rotate(-2deg);animation:none;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s 1.05s forwards;}
  .scroll-hint{display:none;}
  .marquee-track span{font-size:1.02rem;padding:0 1.4rem;}
  .sec-kicker{font-size:1.3rem;}
  .sec-title{font-size:clamp(3rem,14vw,4.4rem);}
  .about-body{font-size:1.05rem;}
  .stats-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
  .stat-cell{padding:1.05rem .65rem;}
  .stat-n,.stat-suf{font-size:2.2rem;}
  .stat-l{font-size:.5rem;}
  .currently{padding:2rem 1.4rem 1.7rem;box-shadow:6px 6px 0 var(--coral);}
  .tape{width:74px;height:22px;top:-11px;}
  .projects-list{gap:2rem;}
  .project-card,.project-card:nth-child(even){grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1.5rem;padding:2rem 1.5rem;box-shadow:6px 6px 0 var(--dark);}
  .pc-media,.project-card:nth-child(even) .pc-media{order:-1;max-width:130px;margin:0 auto;}
  .pc-ghost,.project-card:nth-child(even) .pc-ghost{font-size:5.6rem;top:-1.6rem;right:.6rem;left:auto;}
  .project-card:nth-child(odd) .pc-media img,.project-card:nth-child(even) .pc-media img{transform:rotate(-3deg);}
  .achieve-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1.4rem;}
  .achieve-cell{padding:1.7rem 1.5rem;}
  .platform-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:.75rem;padding:1.6rem 0;}
  .platform-row:hover{padding-left:0;}
  .pf-link{justify-self:start;}
  .pf-name{font-size:2rem;}
  .contact-head{font-size:clamp(3rem,13vw,4.2rem);}
  .cl-row{padding:1.2rem .6rem;margin:0 -.6rem;}
  .cl-value{font-size:.86rem;}
  footer{padding:3.5rem 1.25rem 1.8rem;}
  .footer-main{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.3rem;}
  .footer-brand{grid-column:auto;}
  .footer-bottom{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:.8rem;}
}
@media (max-width:380px){
  .hero-name{font-size:clamp(3.3rem,18vw,4rem);}
  .stat-n,.stat-suf{font-size:1.85rem;}
  .hero-star{width:78px;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

</nav>

  <a href="#content" class="mm-link">Content</a>
  <a href="#contact" class="mm-link">Contact</a>

</div>

<section id="hero">
  <div class="halftone ht-hero"></div>
  <div class="doodles">
    <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 1440 900" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M520,80 Q570,58 620,80 Q670,102 720,80 Q770,58 820,80 Q870,102 920,80" stroke="#1A1209" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="1320" cy="470" r="76" stroke="#FFF8EE" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="9 6" fill="none" opacity="0.45"/>
      <g transform="translate(85,700)" opacity="0.2"><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="21" fill="#1A1209"/><circle cx="30" cy="-19" r="12" fill="#1A1209"/><circle cx="-30" cy="-19" r="12" fill="#1A1209"/><circle cx="17" cy="-34" r="9" fill="#1A1209"/><circle cx="-17" cy="-34" r="9" fill="#1A1209"/></g>
      <path d="M1020,740 L1052,718 L1084,740 L1116,718 L1148,740 L1180,718 L1212,740" stroke="#FFD93D" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.6"/>
      <path d="M1060,200 Q1125,148 1170,200 Q1212,252 1150,292 Q1088,332 1048,280 Q1008,228 1060,200Z" fill="#B8A9E8" opacity="0.38"/>
      <g transform="translate(1355,655)" opacity="0.4"><path d="M-32,0 L32,0 M16,-16 L32,0 L16,16" stroke="#FFF8EE" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <img class="hero-star" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-kicker">Founder &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; Builder &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; Athlete</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">OJASVI<span class="l2">KUSHWAHA</span></h1>
    <div class="jaz-note"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 30" fill="none"><path d="M36,26 Q20,22 10,7 M10,7 L7.5,17 M10,7 L20,9" stroke="#FFD93D" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>everyone calls me <b>jaz</b></div>
    <p class="hero-sub">15 years old. Building <span class="words"><span class="words-in"><span>an AI engine</span><span>a brand</span><span>stamina</span><span>hard things</span><span>an AI engine</span></span></span> â€” and figuring out the rest as I go.</p>
    <div class="hero-meta">
      <div class="hm-item"><span class="hm-label">Location</span><span class="hm-value">Bhopal, India</span></div>
      <div class="hm-item"><span class="hm-label">Currently</span><span class="hm-value">Building Unseen</span></div>
      <div class="hm-item"><span class="hm-label">Class</span><span class="hm-value">CBSE '27</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stickers">
      <span class="chip c1">Unseen â€” AI evidence engine</span>
      <span class="chip c2">21km done at 15</span>
      <span class="chip c3">First site sold at 14</span>
    </div>
    <div class="float-note">Execution &gt; Theory</div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint"><span>scroll</span><div class="scroll-line"></div></div>
</section>

<div class="marquee m1" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span>Founder</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Builder</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>21km Runner</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Content Creator</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Execution over Theory</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Unseen â€” Evidence Engine</span><span class="dot">/</span>
    <span>Founder</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Builder</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>21km Runner</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Content Creator</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Execution over Theory</span><span class="dot">/</span><span>Unseen â€” Evidence Engine</span><span class="dot">/</span>
  </div>
</div>

  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span>Doing too much with too little</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span><span>Refusing to stop</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span><span>Build in public</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span><span>Show up daily</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span>
    <span>Doing too much with too little</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span><span>Refusing to stop</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span><span>Build in public</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span><span>Show up daily</span><span class="dot">â˜…</span>
  </div>
</div>

<section id="about">
  <div class="shell">
    <div class="sec-kicker reveal">the human behind it</div>
    <div class="sec-title reveal">WHO I AM</div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="about-rule reveal"></div>
        <p class="about-body reveal">
          I'm Ojasvi â€” everyone calls me Jaz. I'm 15, from Bhopal, and I tend to have <span class="hl">too many things going on at once</span> â€” which is fine, because I've stopped pretending otherwise.
          <br><br>
          I'm currently building <strong>Unseen</strong> â€” an AI evidence engine, because people do impressive things every day and have no clean way to prove them. You describe something real you've done; it pulls out the skills, scores how strongly the story actually proves each one, and turns it into resume bullets, a STAR story, and a LinkedIn blurb. <span class="hl">It evaluates â€” it doesn't flatter.</span> Weak evidence gets low confidence, and numbers are never invented.
          <br><br>
          Before this, I sold my first website to a local business at 14, ran a half marathon, debated at national MUNs, and somehow coordinated school events for 500+ people. I don't fully know how, either.
          <br><br>
          <strong>Mindset: Execution over theory. Always has been.</strong>
        </p>
        <svg class="squiggle reveal" width="230" height="20" viewBox="0 0 230 20"><path d="M0,10 Q20,2 40,10 Q60,18 80,10 Q100,2 120,10 Q140,18 160,10 Q180,2 200,10 Q215,15 230,10" stroke="#FF6B47" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        <div class="stats-row reveal rd1" id="stats">
          <div class="stat-cell"><span><span class="stat-n" data-count="21">0</span></span><span class="stat-l">km at 15</span></div>
          <div class="stat-cell"><span><span class="stat-n" data-count="5">0</span></span><span class="stat-l">team built</span></div>
          <div class="stat-cell"><span><span class="stat-n" data-count="500">0</span><span class="stat-suf">+</span></span><span class="stat-l">event attendees</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal rd2">
        <div class="currently">
          <span class="tape t1"></span><span class="tape t2"></span>
          <div class="cur-label">Right now</div>
          <div class="cur-item"><span class="cur-dot"></span><div><span class="cur-text">Building Unseen</span><span class="cur-sub">AI evidence engine Â· proof over claims</span></div></div>
          <div class="cur-item"><span class="cur-dot"></span><div><span class="cur-text">School exams</span><span class="cur-sub">Class 10 Â· July 2026</span></div></div>
          <div class="cur-item"><span class="cur-dot"></span><div><span class="cur-text">Growing @ohhjazzvv</span><span class="cur-sub">Instagram Â· content creation</span></div></div>
          <div class="cur-item"><span class="cur-dot"></span><div><span class="cur-text">Freelance web projects</span><span class="cur-sub">Beauty salon + local business sites</span></div></div>
          <div class="cur-item"><span class="cur-dot"></span><div><span class="cur-text">Learning Arduino + microcontrollers</span><span class="cur-sub">Hardware Â· robotics long-term</span></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="checker" aria-hidden="true"></div>

<section id="projects">
  <div class="shell">
    <div class="sec-kicker reveal">what i'm building</div>
    <div class="sec-title reveal">PROJECTS</div>
    <div class="projects-list">

      <article class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="pc-ghost" aria-hidden="true">01</span>
        <div class="pc-text">
          <div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">Personal Brand</span><span class="pc-tag">Ongoing</span></div>
          <h3 class="pc-name">@ohhjazzvv</h3>
          <p class="pc-desc">Building in public as a 15-year-old founder. Content about building, running, and the chaos of doing too many things at once. Real, unfiltered, Hinglish â€” growing an audience of people who are actually doing things.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="pc-media"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dinosaur character" loading="lazy"></div>
      </article>

      <article class="project-card reveal rd1">
        <span class="pc-ghost" aria-hidden="true">02</span>
        <div class="pc-text">
          <div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">AI Engine</span><span class="pc-tag">Next.js + Gemini</span><span class="pc-tag">Problem-first</span></div>
          <h3 class="pc-name">Unseen</h3>
          <p class="pc-desc">Built around a real problem â€” people do impressive things and have no way to prove them. Describe a real experience and Unseen extracts the skills, scores how strongly the story actually proves each one, and turns it into resume bullets, STAR stories, and LinkedIn blurbs. Evidence, not flattery. Next.js + TypeScript, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Supabase, Zod.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="pc-media"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Star character" loading="lazy"></div>
      </article>

      <article class="project-card reveal rd2">
        <span class="pc-ghost" aria-hidden="true">03</span>
        <div class="pc-text">
          <div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">Hardware</span><span class="pc-tag">Learning</span></div>
          <h3 class="pc-name">Arduino + Microcontrollers</h3>
          <p class="pc-desc">Working through embedded systems, C/C++, and microcontroller fundamentals. The long-term direction is robotics â€” the goal is to eventually build things you can actually hold.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="pc-media"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Cow character" loading="lazy"></div>
      </article>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="wave" style="background:var(--lavender);margin-bottom:-2px;" aria-hidden="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 60" preserveAspectRatio="none" height="60" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,20 Q360,70 720,20 Q1080,-30 1440,40 L1440,60 L0,60Z" fill="#FFD93D"/></svg>
</div>

<section id="achievements">
  <div class="halftone ht-ach"></div>
  <div class="shell">
    <div class="sec-kicker reveal">the receipts</div>
    <div class="sec-title reveal">THE WINS</div>
    <div class="achieve-grid">
      <div class="achieve-cell reveal"><div class="ac-year">2025 Â· Athletics</div><div class="ac-title">21km Half Marathon</div><p class="ac-desc">Completed at 15. Proof of discipline, pain tolerance, and long-term commitment to something hard.</p></div>
      <div class="achieve-cell reveal rd1"><div class="ac-year">2025 Â· Business</div><div class="ac-title">First Website Sold</div><p class="ac-desc">Built and sold a single-page website to a local business. Handled everything â€” outreach, proposal, build, delivery.</p></div>
      <div class="achieve-cell reveal"><div class="ac-year">2026 Â· Startup</div><div class="ac-title">Built a 5-Person Team</div><p class="ac-desc">Assembled a full product team from scratch â€” co-founder, designer, backend developer. All sourced independently.</p></div>
      <div class="achieve-cell reveal rd1"><div class="ac-year">2024-25 Â· Comms</div><div class="ac-title">MUN â€” Best Delegation</div><p class="ac-desc">Best Delegation and Special Mentions at IIMUN and AIMUN. Started debating at 13.</p></div>
      <div class="achieve-cell reveal"><div class="ac-year">2024-26 Â· Leadership</div><div class="ac-title">Events Lead Â· 500+ Attendees</div><p class="ac-desc">Lead coordinator for Sports Day and Annual Function. End-to-end event management for the whole school.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="wave" style="background:var(--yellow);margin-bottom:-2px;" aria-hidden="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 52" preserveAspectRatio="none" height="52" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,40 L60,10 L120,40 L180,10 L240,40 L300,10 L360,40 L420,10 L480,40 L540,10 L600,40 L660,10 L720,40 L780,10 L840,40 L900,10 L960,40 L1020,10 L1080,40 L1140,10 L1200,40 L1260,10 L1320,40 L1380,10 L1440,40 L1440,52 L0,52Z" fill="#6DDBB4"/></svg>
</div>

<section id="content">
  <div class="shell">
    <div class="sec-kicker reveal">where i post</div>
    <div class="sec-title reveal">CONTENT</div>
    <div class="platforms">
      <div class="platform-row reveal">
        <div><span class="pf-label">Instagram</span><div class="pf-name">@ohhjazzvv</div></div>
        <p class="pf-desc">Building in public. The chaos of being a teen founder â€” exams, product sprints, content, all at once. Hinglish. 3â€“5x a week.</p>

<script>
const nav=document.getElementById('main-nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{ if(window.scrollY>60)nav.classList.add('scrolled');else nav.classList.remove('scrolled'); },{passive:true});

const burger=document.getElementById('burger');
burger.addEventListener('click',()=>document.body.classList.toggle('menu-open'));
document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-menu a').forEach(a=>a.addEventListener('click',()=>document.body.classList.remove('menu-open')));

const reveals=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
const ro=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('visible'); ro.unobserve(e.target); } });
},{threshold:.08});
reveals.forEach(el=>ro.observe(el));

function countUp(el){
  const target=+el.dataset.count, dur=1000, t0=performance.now();
  const step=t=>{ const p=Math.min((t-t0)/dur,1); el.textContent=Math.round(target*(1-Math.pow(1-p,3))); if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(step); };
  requestAnimationFrame(step);
}
const stats=document.getElementById('stats');
if(stats){
  const so=new IntersectionObserver(es=>{
    es.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting){ stats.querySelectorAll('.stat-n').forEach(countUp); so.unobserve(stats); } });
  },{threshold:.4});
  so.observe(stats);
}

const ce=document.getElementById('copyEmail');
if(ce){ce.addEventListener('click',async()=>{
  const em='ojasvikushwaha83@gmail.com';
  try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(em);}
  catch(_){const t=document.createElement('textarea');t.value=em;document.body.appendChild(t);t.select();document.execCommand('copy');t.remove();}
  ce.textContent='Copied!';ce.classList.add('done');
  setTimeout(()=>{ce.textContent='Copy email address';ce.classList.remove('done');},1600);
});}

document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a=>{
  a.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    e.preventDefault();
    const t=document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
    if(t)t.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
  });
});

const secs=document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
const navlinks=document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  let cur='';
  secs.forEach(s=>{ if(window.scrollY>=s.offsetTop-220)cur=s.id; });
  navlinks.forEach(l=>l.classList.toggle('active',l.getAttribute('href')==='#'+cur));
},{passive:true});
</script>
</body>
</html>
